title: Protocol for Polar Metabolomics of Urinary Samples from Cattle
author: Lieven Van Meulebroek
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ngmdbu6

steps.instruction: undetermined, Propylthiouracil-d5 internal standard undetermined, Phosphate buffer (containing 1% DL-dithiothreitol)
undetermined, ethyl acetate Collect the supernatans in a separate recipient undetermined, ethyl acetate Collect the supernatans in the previously mentioned recipient.
Evaparation under a gentle stream of nitrogen until dry Undetermined undetermined, Dissolve the residue in ultra pure water (0.1% formic acid)/methanol (0.1% formic acid) (90/10, v/v)
